name: Meta: PAA + Volatility Momentum Blend
description: Equal-weight ensemble of Protective Asset Allocation (15% vol) and Volatility-Adjusted Momentum Top-2 (15% vol). PAA uses SMA trend filters to defensively shift into bonds; VolMom selects assets by risk-adjusted momentum. The two mechanisms complement each other — PAA is defensive, VolMom is selective — providing diversification across protective strategies.
